Treesmasher realm-spawn. Version 'X1.8.1' (early build). Standard login MOTD. Twitch sub-goal overlay present (compresses chat). Heavy social chat (trading/banter).
uncertain: Craig's 'I AM INCREASING IN [word]' still clipped (implemented as 'IN STRENGTH', reconstructed). 108 entries not individually name-identified (thumbnail res). No no-footage-dungeon match.
